artifact_role: P3.4b review-only static AU and stratum universe
non_goals: does not generate VDYP or BatchTIPSY curves
does not perform MP10 TIPSY parameter crosswalk
does not encode THLB, operability, treatment eligibility, cedar, or NICF expansion status into AU identity

policy.bec_grouping: zone plus subzone plus variant plus phase where present; current R1 phase is null for all rows
policy.species_combo: top two non-null VDYP primary-layer species by listed percentage/order, rendered as species1+species2
policy.si_class: stratum-local estimated_site_index p35/p65 breakpoints for review L/M/H bins

plot_spec.pattern: selected-strata horizontal relative abundance bars plus site-index violins and sampled strip points
plot_spec.filename_policy: TFL-specific output names; no TSA prefix because TFL 6 is a Tree Farm Licence, not a Timber Supply Area

role: canonical TFL 6 AU universe: L/M/H SI-class splits of selected top-area strata only
